subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सा महल है?
explanation_en: Amer Fort is the famous fort located in Jaipur. It is one of the major attractions of the city and a part of the UNESCO World Heritage Site - The Amer-Sisod Historic Township.
